name: Okumura Engineering corp.
summary: Okumura Engineering Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells construction and engineering machineries and components. It offers gas piping equipment, pavement restoration work, asphalt mixture, stone crusher, sharp curve propulsion work, interlocking blocks, graters, vibration feeders, single jaw crushers, magnetic separators, dust collectors, and drainage pavement regeneration technology. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Gamou, Japan.
